title: BTA Minimap
description: A Minimap Mod for Better Than Adventure
body:
_This mod uses a modified version of Fabric (Babric) and is designed only for Better than Adventure, a heavily modified version of Minecraft b1.7.3!
For more information, join the discord server provided on this projects page._

### A Minimap Mod for Better Than Adventure!

Features:
- Map
- Waypoints
- Customizable
- Ingame Config Menu (Can be opened with M by default)

Compatible with Babric and ASMLoader

![Ingame Screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cdaecf98d99d9a7ef89976ffb609580474a3132e.png)
